sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and FRI source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>2696<pc>1-0196<k1>anu<k2>a/nu<h>1
1. {#a/nu#}¦
<div n="1"> 1) <lex>adv.</lex>
<div n="2"> a) {%hinterher%} (örtlich)
<ls>VOP. 9,18.</ls>
<div n="2">— b) {%später, darauf%}: {#nyu^ptA a\kzA anu^ dI\va A^san#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,27,17.</ls> {#asmAnbaDizyati . anu dASaraTiM rAmam#} {%zuerst uns, darauf%} <is>Rāma</is>
<ls>R. 2,84,4.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 8,37.</ls> {%hierauf, nun%}: {#etAvadvA idaM sarvaM yadannaM tadAtmana AgAsIranu no 'sminna anna ABajasva#}
<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,3,18.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) {%wiederum%}: {#yadeveha tadamutra yadamutra tadanviha#}
<ls>KAṬHOP. 4,10.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) {%ferner, dann, und%}: {#adya bArhaspataH SrImAnyuktaH puzyo 'nu rAGava . procyate brAhmaREH prAjYEH kena tvamasi durmanAH ..#}
<ls>R. 2,26,9.</ls> (<ls>GORR. 2,26,11</ls>: {#kiM nu bArhaspato yogo yuktaH puzyeRa rAGava . pro˚ brA˚ tajjYEryena tva˚#}). — Ein scheinbar <lex>adv.</lex> Gebrauch des Wortes
<ls>SV. I,1,2,4,2.</ls> hebt sich auf durch richtige Verbindung von {#anu#} mit {#syAt#} .
<div n="1">— 2) <ab>praep.</ab>
<div n="2"> a) {%entlang, über — hin, längs, an%};
<div n="3"> α) mit <ab>vorang.</ab> oder <ab>folg.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab>: {#adf^Sramasya ke\tavo\ vi ra\Smayo\ janA\~ anu^#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,50,3.</ls> {#pa\re\yi\vAMsa^M pra\vato^ ma\hIranu^#}
<ls n="ṚV.">10,14,1.</ls> {#A yA^hyagne pa\TyA\3^\ anu\ svAH#}
<ls n="ṚV.">7,7,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">1,80,8.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">8,43,21.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,14,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 10,14,">14.</ls> <ls>AV. 6,69,2.</ls> Verstärkt mit {#A#} (<ab>vgl.</ab> {#aDi#}): {#DanvAnvA mf^ga\yaso\ vi ta^sTuH#}
<ls>ṚV. 2,38,7.</ls> {#so 'SvameDaSatenezwvA yamunAmanu vIryavAn . triSatASvAnsarasvatyAM gaNgAmanu catuHSatAn ..#}
<ls>MBH. 7,2384.</ls> {#niveSya gaNgAmanu — camUm#}
<ls>R. 2,83,26.</ls> {#DvajinIM gaNgAmanvASritAm#}
<ls n="R. 2,">84,1.</ls> {#pampAnivAsinAmezAmanu mandAkinImapi#}
<ls n="R.">3,10,18.</ls> <ls n="R.">6,3,31.</ls> {#sarayUmanvayAM nadIm#}
<ls>DAŚ. 1,19.</ls> {#parvatamanvavasitA#} (von {#si#}) {#senA#}
<ls>P. 1,4,85</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
(= {#parvatena saha saMbadDA#}).
<div n="3">— β) mit <ab>vorang.</ab> <ab>gen.</ab>: {#gaNgAyA anu vArARasI#}
<ls>P. 2,1,16</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="3">— γ) bildet mit dem regierten Worte ein <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>
<ls>P. 2,1,16.</ls> {#anugaNgaM vArARasI#}
<ab>Sch.</ab> {#anumAlinItIramASramo dfSyate#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 7,10.</ls>
<ls>MEGH. 21.</ls> <ls n="MEGH.">51</ls> (an beiden Stellen zu verbinden). Im <ab>comp.</ab> ohne Flexionsendung: {#giririva — anutawapuzpitakarRikArayazwiH#}
<ls>VIKR. 44.</ls>
<div n="2">— b) {%durch — hin%}, mit <ab>vorang.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab>: {#antarikzaM vA anu rakzaScarati#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,1,2,4.</ls> {#antarikzamanvemi#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 1,1,2,">22.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) {%zu — hin, nach — hin%};
<div n="3"> α) mit <ab>vorang.</ab> <ab>acc.</ab>: {#parA^ me yanti DI\tayo\ gAvo\ gavyU^tI\ranu^#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,25,16.</ls> {#e\zo ha^ de\vaH pra\diSo 'nu\ sarvAH#}
<ls>VS. 32,4.</ls> = <ls>ŚVETĀŚV. UP. 2,16.</ls> {#diSo 'nu sarvAH#}
<ls>TAITT. BR. 3,1,1,6.</ls> {#yAM yAM diSamanu#}
<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 3,8,9.</ls> {#vfkzamanu vidyotate vidyut#}
<ls>P. 1,4,90</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="3">— β) bildet mit dem regierten Worte ein <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>: {#anuvanamaSanirgatA#} (= {#vanasya samIpam#})
<ls>P. 2,1,15</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="2">— d) {%hinter, hinter — her%};
<div n="3"> α) mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#ta\M praya\ntama\nu pra\cyotosta\syeSvaraH#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,1,2,22.</ls> {#yajamAna eva juhUmanu yo 'smA arAtIyati sa upaBftamanu#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 1,">3,2,11.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 1,">5,2,2.</ls> {#jagAmAnu purohitam#}
<ls>R. 2,90,3.</ls> {#tataH kOtukAdahamapi tAvanu prasTitaH#}
<ls>PAÑCAT. 165,5.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#i, gam, pad, vart#} <ab>u. s. w.</ab> mit {#anu#} .
<div n="3">— β) mit dem <ab>abl.</ab>
<ls>VOP. 8,56</ls>; <ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> {%f%}, β
und <ab>u.</ab> {%k.%}
<div n="3">— γ) bildet mit dem <ab>reg.</ab> Worte ein <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>: {#anuraTam = raTasya paScAt#}
<ls>P. 2,1,6</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="2">— e) {%zur Zeit von, um%}, auch mit Uebergang in die distributive Bedeutung;
<div n="3"> α) mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#agne\ pUrvA\ anU\zaso^ viBAvaso dIdeTa#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,44,10.</ls> {#vaya^Scitte pata\triRo^ dvi\paccatu^zpadarjuni . u\zaH prAra^nnf\tU~ranu^#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">49,3.</ls> {#pibA\ soma^mf\tU~ranu^#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">15,5.</ls> {#anu\ dyUn#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">71,6.</ls>
[Page1-0197]
{#prakASIBAvasyAnuvizwamBamanu#}
<ls>NIR. 12,1.</ls>
<div n="3">— β) in <ab>distr.</ab> <ab>Bed.</ab> am Anfange eines <lex>adv.</lex> <ab>comp.</ab>; <ab>s.</ab> {#anukAlam, anukzaRam, anudivasam, anvaham#} .
<div n="2">— f) {%unmittelbar nach, nach, auf%} (zeitlich);
<div n="3"> α) mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#pUrvA\manu\ praya^ti\mA da^de va\strInyu\ktAn#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,126,5.</ls> {#i\daM hyanvoja^sA su\taM rA^DAnAM pate#}
<ls n="ṚV.">3,51,10.</ls> {#tAH kalpamAnA anu manuzyaviSaH kalpanta iti#}
<ls>AIT. BR. 1,9.</ls> {#tadanu#} {%hierauf%}
<ls>MEGH. 13.</ls>
<ls>AMAR. 65.</ls>
<div n="3">— β) mit dem <ab>gen.</ab>: {#anu tasyAparaM BUtam — prAptam#}
<ls>ARJ. 3,20.</ls> {#tasyAnu#} (<ab>Calc. Ausg.</ab>: {#tato 'nu) damayantI ca vavande pitaram#}
<ls>N. (BOPP) 25,2.</ls>
<div n="2">— g) {%nach%} (in der Reihenfolge), mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#tadanu#} {%darauf%}
<ls>ŚRUT. 38.</ls> (<ls>BR. 39.</ls>) {#vfkzaM vfkzamanu ciYcati#} {%er begiesst einen Baum nach dem andern%}
<ls>P. 1,4,90</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
mit dem Nebenbegriff der Unterordnung: {#anu hariM surAH = harerhInAH#}
<ls>P. 1,4,86</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#vizRumanvarcyate BargaH#}
<ls>VOPAD. 5,7.</ls> Im <ab>comp.</ab> <ab>s.</ab> {#anujyezWa, anupUrva#} <ab>u. s. w.</ab>
<div n="2">— h) {%gemäss, nach Art, entsprechend%}; mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#anu^ sva\DAm#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,88,6.</ls> {#sva\DAmanu^#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">6,4.</ls> {#vaSA\~ anu^#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">82,3.</ls> {#anu^ vra\tam#}
<ls n="ṚV.">2,38,3.</ls> {#paYca\ vyu^zwI\ranu\ paYca\ dohA\ gAM paYca^nAmnImf\tavo\ anu\ paYca^#}
<ls>AV. 8,9,15.</ls> {#tAni^ BrAta\ranu^ vaH kf\tvyema^si#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,161,3.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">52,14.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">10,11,3.</ls> {#ta\deta\syEvA\nu mA\trAm#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,1,3,2.</ls> {#ya evEtamanu Bavati yo vE tamanu BAryAM buBUrzati#}
<ls>BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,3,18.</ls> {#tasya puruzaviDatAmanvayaM puruzaviDaH#}
<ls>TAITT. UP. 2,2.</ls> {#SAkalyasya saMhitAmanu prAvarzat#}
<ls>P. 1,4,84</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
({#hetuBUtasaMhitAjYAnopalakzitaM varzaRam#}).{# anu rAjAnAmAryAM ca kEkeyIM kAraya#}
<ls>R. 2,58,16.</ls> {#sarvaM mAmanu te#}
<ls>VIKR. 110.</ls>
<div n="2">— i) {%in Betreff von, in Bezug auf%}; mit dem <ab>acc.</ab>: {#ezA brahmaRamanu gATA#}
<ls>CHĀND. UP. 4,17,9.</ls> {#sADurdevadatto mAtaramanu#}
<ls>P. 1,4,90</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
{#sADurnipuRo vA mAtaramanu#}
<ls>SIDDH. K.</ls> zu <ls>P. 2,3,43.</ls> {#yadatra mAmanu syAt#} {%was hiebei auf mich, auf meinen Theil, fallen sollte%}
<ls>P. 1,4,90</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="2">— k) {%in Folge, wegen%}; mit dem <ab>abl.</ab>: {#samasto vata loko 'yaM Bajate kAraRAdanu . tvaM tu nizkAraRAdeva prIyase varavarRini ..#}
<ls>R. 6,10,23.</ls> — Mehrere {#anu#} mit verschiedener Bedeutung erscheinen in dem Verse
<ls>ṚV. 10,17,11</ls> : {#drapSca^skanda praTa\mA~ anu\ dyUni\maM ca\ yoni\manu\ yaSca\ pUrva^H . sa\mA\naM yoni\manu^ sa\Mcara^ntaM dra\psaM ju^ho\myanu^ sa\pta hotrA^H ..#} <ab>vgl.</ab> auch
<ls>VS. 13,5.</ls> Eine <ab>Constr.</ab> mit dem <ab>gen.</ab>
<ls>ṚV. 9,109,7.</ls> (= <ls>SV. I,5,1. 5,10.</ls>) wird durch Herstellung von {#anupUrvyaH#} beseitigt. — Die indischen Grammatiker und <ab>Lexicogr.</ab> geben {#anu#}, das als <ab>indecl.</ab> im <is>gaṇa</is> {#cAdi#} erscheint, <ab>folg.</ab> Bedeutungen:
<div n="1"> 1) {#aparaBAve#}
<ls>NIR. 1,3.</ls> {#paScAt#}
<ls>P. 2,1,6.</ls>
<ls>AK. 3,4,32,9.</ls> (<ls>COL. 3,4,28,9.</ls>) <ls>H. an. 7,30.</ls> <ls>MED. <is>avy</is>. 42.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {#AyAme#}
<ls>P. 2,1,16.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED. <is>avy</is>. 43.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {#yatsamayA, saMniDO, samIpe#}
<ls>P. 2,1,15.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {#vIpsAyAm#}
<ls>P. 1,4,90.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 5,7.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) {#lakzaRe, cihne#}
<ls>P. 1,4,84.</ls> <ls n="P. 1,4,">90.</ls>
<ls>VOP.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls>
<div n="1">— 6) {#itTaMBUtAKyAne, itTaMBUte, itTaMBAve#}
<ls>P. 1,4,90.</ls>
<ls>VOP.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls>
<div n="1">— 7) {#sAdfSye#}
<ls>NIR. 1,3.</ls>
<ls>AK.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED. <is>avy</is>. 42.</ls> {#yogyatAyAm#}
<ls>P. 2,1,6</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="1"> 8) {#BAge#}
<ls>P. 1,4,90.</ls>
<ls>VOP.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED. <is>avy</is>. 43.</ls>
<div n="1">— 9) {#hIne#}
<ls>P. 1,4,86.</ls>
<ls>VOP.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED. <is>avy</is>. 42.</ls>
<div n="1">— 10) {#tftIyArTe, sahArTe#}
<ls>P. 1,4,85.</ls>
<ls>VOP.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls>
<div n="1">— 11) {#anukrame#}
<ls>P. 2,1,6.</ls>
<ls>MED. <is>avy</is>. 43.</ls> — Ueber den Accent eines <ab>comp.</ab> mit {#anu#} <ab>s.</ab>
<ls>P. 6,2,189.</ls> <ls n="P. 6,2,">190.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#nu#} .
<LEND>

<L>4250<pc>1-050-a<k1>anu<k2>a/nu<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {#a/nu#}¦ <div n="1">— 1〉 <lex>Adv.</lex> <div n="2">— a〉 {%hinterher, nach Andern%} <ls>R. 2,109,9</ls>. <div n="2">— b〉 {%später, darauf%}. <div n="2">— c〉 {%wiederum%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Praep.</ab> <div n="2">— a〉 {%entlang, über%}. — {%hin, längs, an,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> und *<ab>Gen.</ab> <div n="2">— b〉 {%durch — hin,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="2">— c〉 {%zu — hin, nach — hin,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="2">— d〉 {%hinter, hinter — her,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> und *<ab>Abl.</ab> <div n="2">— e〉 {%zur Zeit von, um%} (mit Uebergang in die distributive Bedeutung), mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="2">— f〉 {%unmittelbar nach, nach, auf%} (zeitlich), mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <ab>Abl.</ab> und <ab>Gen.</ab> <div n="2">— g〉 {%nach%} (in der Reihenfolge), mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <ls>LĀṬY. 9,2,29</ls>. <div n="2">— h〉 {%gemäss, nach Art, entsprechend,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="2">— i〉 {%für%} (Gegensatz {%gegen, wider%}), mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="2">— k〉 {%in Betreff von, in Bezug auf,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="2">— b〉 {%in Folge, wegen,%} mit <ab>Abl.</ab> <LEND>

<L>1487<pc>0066-c<k1>anu<k2>anu
{#anu#}¦ {%<ab>ind.</ab>%} (Either used with
nouns to form adverbial compounds,
or as a prefix to verbs and verbal <lbinfo n="de+rivatives"/>
derivatives, or as a separable <lbinfo n="preposi+tion"/>
preposition with <ab>acc.</ab> and regarded as a  <lbinfo n="karma#pravacanIya"/>
{#karmapravacanIya#}) {@1@} After, behind, along after
({#paScAt#}); {#sarve nAradamanu upaviSaMti#} <ls>V. 5</ls>;
{#pramadAmanu saMsTitaH SucA nfpatiH san#}  <lbinfo n="ls:R. 8.+ 72"/>
<ls>R. 8. 72</ls>; {#taM gacCaMtyanu ye vipattizu sadA te#} <lbinfo n="tatpra#tizWASayA"/>
{#tatpratizWASayA#} <ls>Mu. 1. 14</ls>; {#asO#} <lbinfo n="kumArastamajo#nujAtaH"/>
{#kumArastamajonujAtaH#} <ls>R. 6. 78</ls>; {#ratyA ca#} <lbinfo n="sASaMkamanu#prayAtaH"/>
{#sASaMkamanuprayAtaH#} <ls>Ku. 3. 23</ls>; {#krameRa suptAmanu#} <lbinfo n="saMvi#veSa"/>
{#saMviveSa suptotTitAM prAtaranUdatizWat#} <ls>R. 2. 24</ls>;
{#anuvizRu#} = {#vizRoH paScAt#} <ls>P. II. 4. 18</ls> <ls>Sk.</ls>;
{#tadanu kaTeyarmADavIyAmavasTAM#} <ls>Māl. 9. 26</ls>
afterwards. {@--2@} Along, along-side, by
the side of, lengthwise ({#yasya ca#} <lbinfo n="AyA#maH"/>
{#AyAmaH#}); {#jalAni sA tIraniKAtayUpA#} <lbinfo n="vahatyayo#DyAmanu"/>
{#vahatyayoDyAmanu rAjaDAnIM#} <ls>R. 13. 61</ls>; {#so'#} <lbinfo n="SvameDaSa#tenezwvA"/>
{#SvameDaSatenezwvA yamunAmanu vIryavAn . triSatASvAn#} <lbinfo n="sara#svatyAM"/>
{#sarasvatyAM gaMgAmanu catuHSatAn#} <ls>Mb.</ls>; {#anugaMgaM#}
{#vArARasI#} = {#gaMgAmanvAyataM#} ( <lbinfo n="gaMgAdErGyasadfSa#dErGyopalakzitA"/>
{#gaMgAdErGyasadfSadErGyopalakzitA#}) situated alongside the
Ganges <ls>P. II. 1. 16</ls> <ls>Sk.</ls>;  <lbinfo n="Avi#rBUtapraTamamukulAH"/>
{#AvirBUtapraTamamukulAH kaMdalIScAnukacCaM#} <ls>Me. 21</ls>;
{#giririva anutawapuzpitakarRikArayazwiH#}  <lbinfo n="ls:V.+ 3. 3"/>
<ls>V. 3. 3</ls> along the sides or slopes. {@--3@} After,
in consequence of, being indicated by;
{#japamanu prAvarzat#} <ls>P. II. 3. 8</ls> <ls>Sk.</ls> ( <lbinfo n="hetuBUtajapo#palakzitaM"/>
{#hetuBUtajapopalakzitaM varzaRaM#}); so {#vfkzamanu vidyotate vidyut#}.
{@--4@} With, along with ({#sahArTe#});
connected with; {#nadImanu avasitA semA#}
<ls>P. I. 4. 85</ls> <ls>Sk.</ls> ({#nadyAsaha saMbadDA#});  <lbinfo n="umAstano#dBedamanu"/>
{#umAstanodBedamanu pravfdDaH#} <ls>Ku. 7. 24</ls> along with, <lbinfo n="con+temporaneously"/>
contemporaneously; <ls>Śi. 8. 56</ls>;  <lbinfo n="divasonumitra#magamadvilayaM"/>
{#divasonumitramagamadvilayaM#} <ls n="Śi.">9. 17.</ls> {@--5@} Inferior or <lbinfo n="sub+ordinate"/>
subordinate to ({#hIne#}); {#mitralABamanu#} <lbinfo n="lABasaM#padaH"/>
{#lABasaMpadaH#} <ls>Ki. 13. 52</ls> inferior, lower in
value or importance; {#anu hariM surAH#} = <lbinfo n="hare#rhInAH"/>
{#harerhInAH#} <ls>P. I. 4. 86</ls> <ls>Sk.</ls> {@--6@} In a <lbinfo n="parti+cular"/>
particular relation or state ({#itTaMBUtAKyAne#}
{#prakAraviSezanirUpaRe#}); {#Bakto vizRumanu#} <ls>Sk.</ls>
({#vizRoritTaMBUtaH, BaktiviSezayuktaH#}) an <lbinfo n="ar+dent"/>
ardent devotee of Viṣṇu; {#yastvAM dvezwi sa#}
{#mAM dvezwi yastvAmanu sa mAmanu#} <ls>Rām.</ls> <lbinfo n="favour+ably"/>
favourably inclined or devoted to. {@--7@} <lbinfo n="Hav+ing"/>
Having a part or share, participation; or
one that claims a share of ({#BAge#});
{#BAgo'syAsti iti BAgasvAmI#}; {#lakzmIrharimanu#}
({#harerBAgaH#}) <ls>Sk.</ls>, {#harisvAmikaBAgavatItyarTaH#}.
{@--8@} Repetition, in a distributive
sense, mostly in <ab>comp.</ab> ({#vIpsArTe#}, <lbinfo n="vizaya#tAyAM"/>
{#vizayatAyAM#}); {#anudivasaM#} day by day, every
day; {#anukzaRaM#} every moment;
{#˚velaM#} every time, frequently; {#vfkzaM#}
{#vfkzamanu siMcati#} <ls>Sk.</ls> waters tree after
tree, {%<ab>i. e.</ab>%} every tree ({#yAvadvfkzavyApakaH#}
{#sekaH#}). {@--9@} Towards, in the direction of 
[Page0067-a+ 56]
near, to, at ({#anuryatsamayA#} <ls>P. II. 1. 15</ls>);
{#anuvanamaSanirgataH#} <ls>Sk.</ls>; {#˚nadi#} <ls>Śi. 7. 24</ls>
near the river; {#prajiGAya kAMtamanu mugDataraH#}
<ls n="Śi.">9. 55</ls> to ({#prati#}); on or in, with the
force of the locative; {#yadetadasyAnutawaM#}
{#viBAti#} <ls n="Śi.">4. 39</ls>, <ls n="Śi.">7. 1</ls>; {#tasmAdgacCeranukanaKalaM#}
{#SElarAjAvatIrRAM (jahnoH kanyAM)#} <ls>Me. 50.</ls>
{@--10@} In orderly succession, according
to; {#anukramaM#} in regular order;  <lbinfo n="anujye#zWaM"/>
{#anujyezWaM#} = {#jyezWasyAnupUrvyeRa#} in order of <lbinfo n="senior+ity"/>
seniority; {#˚pUrvaM; anurUpaM#} = {#rUpasya yogyaM#} <ls>Sk.</ls> {@--11@}
Corresponding with, like, in <lbinfo n="imita+tion"/>
imitation of; {#sarvaM mAmanu te priyAvirahajAM tva#}
{#tu vyaTAM mAnuBUH#} <ls>V. 4. 25</ls>; so {#anugarj#}
to roar after or in imitation of. {@--12@}
Following, conformable to ({#anugata#});
{#taTEva so'BUdanvarTo rAjA prakftiraMjanAt#}  <lbinfo n="ls:R.+ 4. 12"/>
<ls>R. 4. 12</ls> ({#anugato'rTo yasya#}). {@--13@} With <lbinfo n="re+gard"/>
regard to, towards, in respect of;
{#arDyadAnamanu codito vacaH#} <ls>Śi. 14. 53</ls>;  <lbinfo n="sA#Durdevadatto"/>
{#sADurdevadatto mAtaramanu#}. {@--14@} On account of, by
reason of (with <ab>abl.</ab>); {#samasto bata#} <lbinfo n="lo#ko"/>
{#loko'yaM Bajate kAraRAdanu . tvaM tu#} <lbinfo n="nizkAra#RAdeva"/>
{#nizkAraRAdeva prIyase varavarRini ..#} <ls>Rām.</ls> As a
separable adverb {#anu#} is used only in
the Vedas and means after, <lbinfo n="after+wards"/>
afterwards, later on, now, at this time,
again, once more, then, and further.
(The senses of {#anu#} as given by <ls>G. M.</ls>
are: {#--anu#} <lbinfo n="vedADyayanAnuzWAnasAmIpyapaScAdBAvA#nubaMDasAmyABimuKahInavisargalakzaRezu"/>
{#vedADyayanAnuzWAnasAmIpyapaScAdBAvAnubaMDasAmyABimuKahInavisargalakzaRezu#}; {%<ab>e. g.</ab>%} {#vede#}
{#anuvAkaH; anuzWAne anutizWati; sAmIpye#} <lbinfo n="anu#meGaM"/>
{#anumeGaM varzati; paScAdBAve tadanu; anubaMDane anuSete#};
{#sAmye anukaroti; ABimuKye mAtaramanuDAvati#}
{#vatsaH; hIne anuhariM surAH; visarge anujAnIte#};
{#lakzaRe anuvanamaSanirgataH#}). The senses of
{#anu#} may be thus expressed in verse:
--{#AyAme'paraBAve ca (paScAdarTe) vIpsAyAM sanniDO#}
{#taTA . itTaMBUte lakzaRe ca BAgasAdfSyayorapi ..#}
{#yogyatAyAM taTA hIne tftIyArTe hyanukrame .#} <lbinfo n="arTe#zvetezu"/>
{#arTezvetezu bahuSo hyanuSabdaH prayujyate ..#}.
<LEND>

<L>510<pc>0058<k1>anu<k2>a/nu<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {@ánu.@}¦ Grundbegriff: hinter einem andern her, ihm nachfolgend. Daher hat es fast alle Bedeutungen unseres „nach“; also räumlich „nach einem Ziele hin“ (besonders mit dem Nebenbegriffe des Hinstrebens), zeitlich „nach“ (post), bildlich „nach, gemäss“ (secundum). Ferner entwickelt sich aus dem Grundbegriff in der Verbindung mit dem <ab>Acc.</ab> der Begriff „lāngs (einem Flusse oder Wege) hin“, dann aber auch der Begriff der Ausbreitung über ein zusammenhängendes Gebiet, oder über eine Vielheit, und zwar sowol in räumlicher als zeitlicher Beziehung (<lang>gr.</lang> <gk>ἀνὰ</gk> mit <ab>Acc.</ab>). In der ersten Bedeutungsreihe kommt es in zahlreichen Zusammenfügungen mit Verben vor, namentlich mit ar, arṣ, av, aś, <hom>1.</hom> as, i, <hom>1.</hom> ukṣ, <hom>1.</hom> ṛdh, kṛ, krand, krap, kram, kruś, kṣar, khyā, gam, <hom>1.</hom> gā, <hom>1.</hom> gir, gṛbhāy, grabh, ghuṣ, cakṣ, car, cit, jan, jñā, takṣ, tṛd, dah, <hom>1.</hom> dā, diś, dṛś, drū, dham, <hom>1.</hom> dhā, <hom>1.</hom> dhī, nam, nī, <hom>1.</hom> nu, brū, bhā, bhū, (bhūṣ), bhṛ, mad, <hom>1.</hom> man, mand, <hom>1.</hom> <hom>2.</hom> mā, mud, mṛj, mṛś, (yaj), yat, yam, yā, rakṣ, (rabh), <hom>2.</hom> rāj, ri, <hom>1.</hom> rudh, ruh, (labh), vac, vad, vaś, <hom>2.</hom> <hom>4.</hom> vas, vah, <hom>1.</hom> vā, vid, vīray, vṛj, vṛt, vṛdh, ven, śaṃs, śak, śās, śrath, <hom>1.</hom> cru, sac, sidh, sṛ, sṛj, stu, sthā, spaś, spṛś, sphur, smṛ, syad, <hom>1.</hom> hā, hū. Als selbständiges Adverb erscheint es nur zweimal, als <ab>Präp.</ab> nur mit dem Accusativ. <div n="P"><ab>Adv.</ab> {%darauf%} {853,17}; {798,42}. <div n="P"><ab>Präp.</ab> mit <ab>Acc.</ab> 1〉 {%nach — hin%} (mit dem Nebenbegriffe des Strebens) gávyūtīs 〰 {25,16}; 〰 yávasam {432,2}; imám … yónim 〰 {843,11}; 〰 kṣā́ṣ {828,6}; 〰 śríyam {46,14}; sā́ma 〰 {961,4}; 〰 vā́tasya viṣṭhā́s {994,2}. 2〉 zeitlich: {%nach%} 〰 práyatim {126,5}; yajñám 〰 {316,2}; sīm 〰 (darauf) {37,9}; {141,9}; {318,7}; 〰 druhyúm {534,12}. 3〉 {%nach%} einem innern Triebe oder Vermögen: svadhā́m 〰 {6,4}; {165,5}; {640,7}; 〰 svadhā́m {33,11}; {88,6}; {285,11}; {329,6}; {348,6}; {572,13}; 〰 svadhā́s {815,5}; svadhā́s 〰 {652,19}; {863,5}; 〰 jósam {212,3}; {221,2}; {228,1}; {387,2}; {464,8}; {507,4}; 〰 okíam {1018,3}; váśān 〰 {82,3}; {181,5}; [Page59] {624,10} {917,7}; 〰 krátum {837,3}; {672,5}; {985,2}; {336,4} (krátum dadhikrā́s 〰); daṃsánās 〰 {866,9}. 4〉 {%nach%} eines andern Bitte, Willen oder Vorschrift: úpamātim kanā́yās 〰 {887,21}; 〰 asya kétam {229,5}; 〰 vratám {128,1}; {136,5}; {229,3}. _{229,6}; {660,8}; {661,3}. _{661,7}; {948,2}; {309,2}; 〰 vratā́ {456,9}; {661,10}; nivídas pūrviā́s 〰 {227,6}; tā́m 〰 (tvā) nivídam {175,6}; 〰 pradíśam (so statt prá díśam zu lesen) {95,3}; {325,3}; 〰 dhármā (oder dhárma) {251,1}. _{251,5}; {882,3}; {975,3}; 〰 dhā́ma {809,5}. 5〉 {%nach, gemäss%} (in dem Sinne der Aehnlichkeit) 〰 pradívas {284,2}; {606,4}; {277,1}; 〰 saptá hótrās {843,11}; tā́m 〰 (tvā) návīyasīm niyútam {138,3}; vṛddhā́yum 〰 {10,12}. 6〉 {%nach%} einem Lichtschein oder Geräusch seine Richtung nehmend: 〰 ghóṣam {241,6}; klóśam 〰 {487,14}; 〰 dyútam {766,1}; 〰 amátim {416,5}. 7〉 {%längs, entlang:%} sárasvatīm 〰 {641,18}; nāvíās 〰 {80,8}; pathíās 〰 {246,7}; {269,8}; {523,2}; {840,2}; pánthām 〰 {828,7}; {809,32}; ádhvānam 〰 {877,6}; pravátas mahī́s 〰 {840,1}. 8〉 {%durch — hin,%} <ab>d. h.</ab> an allen Orten eines Gebietes: pṛthivī́m 〰 {923,19}; ródasī 〰 {273,8}; {630,6}; jánasī ubhé 〰 {193,4}; idám hí (<ab>neb.</ab> sadhástham) 〰 {285,10}; 〰 svarā́jiam {80,1}—_{80,16}; {84,10}; {199,5}; so auch, wenn das Gebiet durch eine Mehrheit vertreten wird: jánān 〰 {50,3}. _{50,6}; {120,11}; mā́nuṣān 〰 {629,2}; víśas víśvās 〰 {631,8}; {663,21}; prajā́s 〰 {882,5}; 〰 pū́rvāni okíā smārājiásya {645,17}; janúṣī ubhé 〰 {782,3}; víśvam 〰 {1027,2} (überall); so auch durch ā́ verstärkt, welches die Bewegung durch das Gebiet hin hervorhebt: dhánva‿ 〰 ā́ {229,7}; 〰 svám ā́ rájas {775,6}. 9〉 {%hin und her in,%} <ab>d. h.</ab> an verschiedenen Orten eines Gebiets oder einer Mehrheit: vánā 〰 {289,4}; gómatīs 〰 {415,19}. 10〉 Mit einem Zeitbegriffe im Plural {%zu jeder%} der genannten Zeiten: 〰 dyū́n (täglich, Tag für Tag) {71,6}; {113,13}; {121,3}. _{121,7}; {167,10}; {180,8}; {204,13}; {219,2}; {257,2}; {300,8}. _{300,9}; {440,5}; {508,6}; {843,11}; {853,5}; {871,11}; ṛtū́n 〰 {15,5}; {49,3}; 〰 uṣásas {44,10}; uṣásas rā́miās 〰 {193,8}; 〰 pūrvī́s (uṣásas) {249,3}; 〰 saṃvátas {191,15}. <div n="P">In {821,7} ist wahrscheinlich anupūrvias statt ánu pūrviás zu lesen [<ls>BR.</ls>]; in {622,33} ánu gha‿íd ist der zu erwartende Casus tám durch gha íd vertreten. Unklar bleibt {931,2} (ánu śépā). <LEND>

<L>1047<pc>048<k1>anu<k2>anu +anu (anveti) <div n="1"/>1 <lang n="czech">jíti za někým, následovati, napodobovati; hledati</lang> <div n="1"/>2 <lang n="russian">итти за кем-нибудь, следовать, подражать; искать</lang> <div n="1"/>3 <lang n="english">to go after, follow, imitate; seek</lang> <LEND>
